strategic_significance: Pivotal center for Ukrainian defenses after Soledar's fall; served as regrouping position for troops rotating in/out of Bakhmut; became fortified forward artillery base
contested_history_summary: Intense fighting from 2024 onward. Major RU offensives from December 2023, direct assault from April 2024. By early 2025, ~90% under Russian control though UA sources claimed continued presence.
notes: Centroid of OP SILENT EYE AO. Chasiv Yar's elevation makes it a defensive anchor for the Bakhmut salient — losing it threatens Kostyantynivka and the western Donetsk corridor.
